raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un rakstiju to Grahma-
tā/ un aisſehgeleju to/ un likku
aur Leezinekeem to apleezinaht/
nn eefivehru to Nandu us to
Swarra-Kausu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es jehnu to Pirkscha-
nas-Grahmatu/ kas aisſehgele-
ta bija/ pehz to Bauſti un Likku-
meem/ un to atwehru Norakſtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es deivu to Pirkscha-
nas-Grahmatu Bahrukam/Ner-
tijus Dehlam/ ta Dehla Maka-
ejus/ preeſch Kanameeka man-
a Swaina Azzim/ un preeſch
o Leezineeku Azzim/ kas Pirks-
chanas-Grahmata bija raksti-
i/ un preeſch wiſſu Judu Az-
im/ kas Zeetuma Pagalma
ehdeja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "lin es pawehleju Bahru-
lam preeſch winnu Azzim/ un
azziju:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta tafka tas KUNGS
Sebaot/ tas Israeta Deews:
Nemm fchahs Grahmatas/ un
cho Pirkschanas-Grahmatu/
ik labbi to aisſehgeletu/ ka tcho
atwehru Grahmatu/ un leeſ tahs
veena Mahlu Trauka/ ka tahs
lgi warr pastahweht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta tafka tas KUNGS
Sebaot/ tas Israeta Deews:
Wehl taps Nammi un Tihrumi/
n Wihna-Dahrſi fchai Semne
irkti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es peeluhsu to KUN-
Gll/ pehz ka es to Pirkschanas-
Grahmatu Bahrukam Nertius
Dehlam dewis biju/ un tazziju:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ak KUNGS! Raugi/
tu effi to Debbeſi un to Semnt
darrijs zaur tawu leelu Spehku/
nn zaur tawu isſteeptu Elkonu/
ekahda Leeta irr tew ne-eespeh-
jama.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas tu Schehlastibu dar-
ri pee tuhſtofcheem/ un atinaſfa
to Tehwn Noseegumu eeſch
winno Behrnu n Asotes pehz
winneem/ Tu feels un warrens
Deews/ ka Wahrdz irr KUNGS
Sebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Leels Padohma/ un war-
rens Darrischanā/ jo tawas Az-
zis irr atwehru pahr wiſſeem
Zetteem to Zilweko Behrnu/ it-
katram doht pehz faiveem Zef-
teem/ un pehz teem Augteem
winno Darbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas tu effi eezehlis Sih-
mes un Brihnumus Egiptes-
Semne lihdsſchodeen/ tie labbi
Israeta Starpa/ ka starp (zit-
teem) Zilwekeem/ un effi tew
weenu Wahrdz darrijs/ ka scho-
deen irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un effi tawus Israeta
Landis isweddig no Egiptes-
Semnes zaur Sihineim un
Brihnumeem/ un ar weenu stip-
ru Rohku/ un isſteeptu Elkonu/
un zaur leelu Isbeedinachannu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un effi teem fcho Seini
dewis/ ko Tu winnu Tehweein
fwehrejs effi winneem to doht/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
